content: Enable the idempotent producer with enable.idempotence=true and acks=all so that automatic retries after a broker failure or connection drop do not write the same record twice. This deduplicates messages and preserves exactly-once semantics within a partition.
Consumer lag grows when consumers process records slower than producers append them. Add partitions, scale out consumers in the group, and tune max.poll.records to increase throughput.
Frequent consumer group rebalances happen when processing exceeds max.poll.interval.ms. Use the cooperative sticky assignor to avoid stop-the-world rebalances and keep partitions assigned.
Durability options are RDB point-in-time snapshots and the AOF append-only file. AOF with fsync everysec keeps data after a process restart or crash with minimal performance cost.
When memory is full Redis removes keys according to maxmemory-policy. Set maxmemory and a policy such as allkeys-lru to bound memory usage under pressure.
Redis Cluster shards keys across 16384 hash slots. Use hash tags in braces to force related keys into the same slot so multi-key commands work.
A dense_vector field with index true enables approximate nearest neighbor retrieval backed by an HNSW graph. Choose cosine or dot_product similarity to match how the embeddings were trained.
Use the text type for analyzed full-text fields and the keyword type for exact matching, sorting, and aggregations. A multi-field can expose both at once.
Nori 형태소 분석기는 한국어 문장을 형태소 단위로 토큰화하여 공백 기반 토큰화보다 검색 recall을 높인다. 한국어 색인과 질의에 적합하다.
Spring Boot Actuator publishes metrics at /actuator/prometheus when micrometer-registry-prometheus is present and management.endpoints.web.exposure.include lists prometheus.
Set server.shutdown=graceful so Spring Boot drains in-flight requests before stopping, and tune spring.lifecycle.timeout-per-shutdown-phase for the drain window.
Enable spring.threads.virtual.enabled=true to handle requests on JVM virtual threads, improving throughput for blocking I/O workloads without a reactive rewrite.
To shorten garbage collection stalls with G1, set a target with -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis and size the heap so the young generation is large enough to avoid frequent collections.
java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space means the heap is exhausted. Enable -XX:+HeapDumpOnOutOfMemoryError, capture a heap dump, and inspect retained object sets to find the leak.
A pod stuck in CrashLoopBackOff restarts over and over. Run kubectl logs --previous and kubectl describe pod to find the failing command, a bad env var, or a failed probe.
An OOMKilled status means the container went over its memory limit and the kernel killed it. Raise resources.limits.memory or fix the leak, and set requests for correct scheduling.
Liveness probes restart unhealthy containers while readiness probes gate incoming traffic. A liveness probe that fires during slow startup causes unnecessary restarts; add an initial delay.
A pre-signed URL grants time-limited access to a single object so clients can download or upload without the bucket being public. Generate it server-side with a short expiry.
A bucket policy that makes objects publicly readable uses Effect Allow, Principal star, Action s3:GetObject on the bucket ARN. Prefer CloudFront with origin access control over a public S3 bucket.
Least privilege IAM grants only the actions a role needs, avoids Action star wildcards, and uses conditions. Prefer short-lived role credentials over long-lived access keys.
The error too many clients already appears when PostgreSQL runs out of connection slots. Put PgBouncer in front and size the pool rather than opening a connection per request.
Heavy updates cause index bloat that slows queries over time. REINDEX CONCURRENTLY or pg_repack reclaim space without holding long exclusive locks.
Docker reuses build cache until the first changed layer. Copy dependency manifests and install before copying source code so editing code does not invalidate the dependency layer.
A TLS handshake that times out is often caused by client clock skew, a missing intermediate certificate in the chain, or an MTU or firewall issue dropping the ServerHello.
